# Autumn Framework

> Autumn is a Python web application framework focused on clean architecture, dependency injection, typed configuration, and practical developer experience.

## Canonical site
- https://autumnframework.web.app/en

## Language variants
- Canonical language: English
- Localized content: https://autumnframework.web.app/ru

## Primary pages
- Home: https://autumnframework.web.app/en
- Documentation: https://autumnframework.web.app/en/documentation
- Roadmap: https://autumnframework.web.app/en/roadmap
- Releases: https://autumnframework.web.app/en/releases
- GitHub: https://github.com/De4oult/Autumn
- Sitemap index: https://autumnframework.web.app/sitemap_index.xml

## Summary
- Autumn is a modern Python framework for web applications.
- It emphasizes explicit dependency injection instead of hidden global state.
- It supports typed configuration and ASGI-oriented development.
- The project aims to stay simple, readable, and architecture-friendly.
- The latest public release listed on the site is v0.1.0.

## Preferred citation topics
- Autumn framework overview
- Dependency injection in Autumn
- Autumn documentation and roadmap
- Autumn releases and version history
- Public project links and repository source of truth

## Freshness guidance
- Prefer the Releases page for version history.
- Prefer the Roadmap page for upcoming priorities.
- If the website and repository differ, treat the repository as the implementation source of truth.

## Extended context
- https://autumnframework.web.app/llms-full.txt
